title: 🧪 [testing improvement] Add missing error path tests for Sha256Utils
body:
🎯 What: Added tests to cover the try-catch block and file operation paths in Sha256Utils.getCheckSumFromFile().
📊 Coverage: Covered happy path and non-existent file scenarios.
✨ Result: Enhanced test coverage for Sha256Utils.
head: test-sha256utils-coverage
